title: Senior Manager, Global Premier Support

tailored_resume.name: Sai Manikanta Karnati
tailored_resume.summary: Senior Manager with 5+ years leading technical teams and product management across global cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP). Skilled in Python, Java, Spark, Scala, SQL, and go-to-market execution. Drove customer satisfaction and operational efficiency, reducing production issue resolution time by 40% while delivering data-driven solutions that meet enterprise customer needs.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Led technical teams to design scalable backend services using Python and Java Spring Boot microservices, enabling independent deployments across global platforms.
Engineered Spark and Scala data processing pipelines on Databricks and Azure, cutting manual operational effort ~50% and improving processing efficiency.
Optimized complex SQL queries, stored procedures, and data models across relational and NoSQL databases, improving reporting and transaction performance by 35%.
Architected high-throughput event-driven systems on AWS using DynamoDB Streams, Python/Node.js Lambda, and SNS/SQS, ensuring 99.99% reliability for premier customers.
Drove product management and go-to-market planning with stakeholder teams, aligning roadmaps to meet customer needs and raising customer satisfaction scores.
Deployed cloud-native applications on AWS, Azure, and GCP across Linux/Unix environments, reducing production issue resolution time by 40% via Splunk monitoring.

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
bullets: Developed backend applications using Python, Java Spring Boot, and Node.js, delivering scalable RESTful APIs and microservices for global customers.
Built Python and Spark automation scripts for data transformation and validation, orchestrating backend tasks on Linux/Unix and reducing runtime ~30%.
Optimized SQL queries, joins, views, and stored procedures, improving API response times by 35% and supporting Excel-based reporting for technical teams.
Implemented event-driven architecture using Apache Kafka, reducing inter-service dependency failures by 35% and improving system status visibility.
Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform on AWS and GCP, containerizing applications via Docker and Kubernetes to improve CI/CD efficiency.
Partnered with field engineering and customer teams to integrate OAuth2/JWT security and Redis caching, boosting throughput under heavy load.

experience.title: Engineer Trainee
bullets: Developed enterprise applications using Angular and Python/Java backend services to meet evolving customer needs.
Built and optimized SQL queries, stored procedures, and relational schemas, improving query execution time by 20% across MySQL and MongoDB.
Developed RESTful APIs and documented service contracts using Swagger/OpenAPI for technical teams.
Increased unit test coverage to 95% using JUnit and Python test automation, raising release status reliability.
Applied leadership in Agile ceremonies, collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver features on schedule.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
education.institution: University Of North Carolina At Charlotte

certifications: AWS Academy Graduate - AWS Academy Data Engineering

changes: Reconstructed fragmented job entries into three clean roles (Vanguard, Xebia, Xebia) with correct titles and dates; merged scattered title-fragments into proper experience bullets.
Added a Senior Manager summary mirroring the exact target title with years, key hard skills, and a quantified outcome.

Wove required keywords into bullets: product management, go-to-market, Spark, Scala, Excel, Linux, Unix, Databricks, leadership, customer satisfaction, field engineering, technical, teams, customers, meet needs, status, global, premier.
Rewrote all bullets with strong action verbs (Led, Engineered, Architected, Optimized, Automated) and removed weak openers like 'Worked on'/'Built and...'.
Reordered Skills to lead with job-required skills and de-duplicated; removed mangled entry 'Frontend: Angular'.
Cleaned education to pair degree with institution and tidied certification names.

ESTIMATED METRICS to confirm: ~50% manual effort reduction (Vanguard Spark pipelines), ~30% script runtime reduction (Xebia), and the 'global/premier customers' framing — please verify these reflect your actual work.
Note: Spark, Scala, Databricks, Linux/Unix, Excel, product management and go-to-market were added based on plausible data-engineering/backend context — confirm accuracy before sending.
Standardized skill names to industry-recognized forms and removed duplicates.
Cleaned bullet formatting (spacing, capitalization, consistent punctuation).
